message:
🌱 Add litellm: [Bug]: VertexAI Anthropic passthrough fails with mission (#1273)

@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "litellm-19984-bug-vertexai-anthropic-passthrough-fails-with-prompt-caching-scope",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "litellm: [Bug]: VertexAI Anthropic passthrough fails with prompt-caching-scope-2026-01-05 beta header",
+    "description": "[Bug]: VertexAI Anthropic passthrough fails with prompt-caching-scope-2026-01-05 beta header. This issue affects 16+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify litellm troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your litellm deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm -n litellm --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review litellm configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant litellm configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm\nkubectl get configmap -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=litellm\n```\nWhen using Claude Code v2.1.23 through LiteLLM proxy to VertexAI, requests fail because the `anthropic-beta` header contains a value that VertexAI does not support."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [Bug]: VertexAI Anthropic passthrough fails with…",
+        "description": "## Relevant issues\r\n\n## Pre-Submission checklist\n\n- [see details](https://docs.litellm.ai/docs/extras/contributing_code)\r\r\n\n## CI (LiteLLM team)\n\n>\n\n>\n> - 50-55 passing tests: main is stable with minor issues.\n> - 45-49 passing tests: acceptable but needs attention\n> - <= 40 passing tests:\n```yaml\nAPI Error: 400\n{\"type\":\"error\",\"error\":{\"type\":\"invalid_request_error\",\"message\":\"Unexpected value(s) `prompt-caching-scope-2026-01-05` for the `anthropic-beta` header. Please consult our documentation at docs.anthropic.com or try again without the header.\"}}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm [Bug]: VertexAI Anthropic passthrough fails with… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm -n litellm --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n litellm --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Relevant issues\r\n\n## Pre-Submission checklist\n\n- [see details](https://docs.litellm.ai/docs/extras/contributing_code)\r\r\n\n## CI (LiteLLM team)\n\n>\n\n>\n> - 50-55 passing tests: main is stable with minor issues.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "API Error: 400\n{\"type\":\"error\",\"error\":{\"type\":\"invalid_request_error\",\"message\":\"Unexpected value(s) `prompt-caching-scope-2026-01-05` for the `anthropic-beta` header. Please consult our documentation at docs.anthropic.com or try again without the header.\"}}",
+        "⎿ API Error: 400 {\"error\":{\"message\":\"{\\\"message\\\":\\\"invalid beta flag\\\"}No fallback model group found for original                                      \n    model_group=claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929",
+        "export CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_EXPERIMENTAL_BETAS=1"
+      ]
+    }
+  },

+      "litellm",
